status_note: All 5 integration tests passing (92 assertions, 1.4s). Closed 2026-03-22.
description: Remaining work for stateful project tracking — integration tests only. Steps 1-5 are complete.

completed_steps.step-5: Composition root wiring — checkpoint referenced 7x in composition-root.ts

steps.description: Integration test: checkpoint/recover round-trip. Use real FileCheckpointAdapter with temp directory, mock ISwarmPort with sample task data. Checkpoint, recover, verify data integrity including all TaskSnapshot and FeatureProgress fields.
Integration test: prune keeps only N most recent checkpoints. Create 10 checkpoints with staggered timestamps, prune(3), verify exactly 3 remain and they are the most recent.

Integration test: crash simulation. Write checkpoint via one CheckpointOrchestrator instance, create a new instance (simulating process restart), call recover(), verify previous checkpoint is fully loaded with no data loss.
